title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About JK Tyre Ventures Solutions:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
